questions.text: Has a risk management system associated with high-risk AI systems been defined throughout the entire lifecycle?
questions.category: MG01 - Analysis and definition of the internal and external context

questions.text: Have elements of the organization's internal and external context around high-risk AI systems been identified and documented?
questions.category: MG01 - Analysis and definition of the internal and external context

questions.text: Has leadership and commitment to risk management been formalized in the organization (publication of policies, procedures, ensuring that there are sufficient resources, assignment of authority, responsibility and accountability, etc.)?
questions.category: MG01 - Analysis and definition of the internal and external context

questions.text: Has risk appetite been defined and constantly updated (in relation to the risk that the AI system may pose to people's health, safety and fundamental rights)?
questions.category: MG02 - Definition and updating of risk appetite

questions.text: Have all components of the AI system (key actors, data, tools, etc.) been identified, inventoried, and documented?
questions.category: MG03 - Inventory of AI system components

questions.text: Have all risks associated with AI systems (especially those risks that may affect the health, safety and fundamental rights of individuals) been identified, inventoried and documented?
questions.category: MG04 - Identification of the main sources of risk

questions.text: Have all the identified risks been analysed and evaluated (assigning a probability of occurrence and an impact)?
questions.category: MG05 - Assessment of sources of risk

questions.text: Have the possible risks related to the use or impact of the AI system on children under 18 years of age been taken into account (identification of these risks, analysis, evaluation and implementation of treatment measures)?
questions.category: MG06 - Identification and analysis of the impact of the effects and their probability of occurrence

questions.text: Have mechanisms been defined and implemented for communication and consultation around the risk management system of high-risk AI systems?
questions.category: MG07 - Reporting of the results

questions.text: Have the potential risks related to the post-market surveillance system (identification of these risks, analysis, evaluation and implementation of treatment measures) been taken into account?
questions.category: MG08 - Analysis of data collected post-marketing

questions.text: Have risk treatment options been defined and prioritized based on efficacy and feasibility criteria?
questions.category: MG09 - Identification of new possible risks

questions.text: Have appropriate mitigation measures and safeguards been assessed for each identified risk?
questions.category: MG09 - Identification of new possible risks

questions.text: Have all risk management options identified, analysed and assessed been identified?
questions.category: MG10 - Definition and selection of risk management options

questions.text: If defined, has the risk management system associated with high-risk AI systems been implemented throughout the lifecycle?
questions.category: MG11 - Plan and implement risk treatment

questions.text: If implemented, is the risk management system associated with high-risk AI systems maintained continuously throughout the lifecycle?
questions.category: MG11 - Plan and implement risk treatment

questions.text: Have the implementation of the defined treatment measures been planned?
questions.category: MG11 - Plan and implement risk treatment

questions.text: Has a monitoring and continuous improvement process been defined and implemented around the risk management system of high-risk AI systems?
questions.category: MG12 - Evaluate the effectiveness of each treatment

questions.text: Are test procedures in place to ensure that the system serves its purpose (intended purpose)?
questions.category: MG12 - Evaluate the effectiveness of each treatment

questions.text: Are testing procedures in place to ensure that the requirements set out for HRAIS are met?
questions.category: MG12 - Evaluate the effectiveness of each treatment

questions.text: Have real-world tests been defined and implemented?
questions.category: MG12 - Evaluate the effectiveness of each treatment

questions.text: Have the risk management system review and monitoring periods been established?
questions.category: MG13 - Determine if the residual risk is acceptable

questions.text: If defined, has the risk management system associated with high-risk AI systems been documented throughout the lifecycle?
questions.category: MG14 - Document and report residual risks

questions.text: Have the residual risks after the implementation of the treatment measures been documented for communication to those responsible for deploying the AI system?
questions.category: MG14 - Document and report residual risks

questions.text: Has the entire risk management process been documented?
questions.category: MG14 - Document and report residual risks
